ground_truth.title: Saga Orchestration for TypeScript | Saga Bus
ground_truth.main_content: Saga Bus is an open-source saga orchestration library for TypeScript/Node.js. Build reliable distributed workflows with type-safe DSL, multiple message brokers, and built-in observability. Key features include Type-Safe DSL with fluent builder API and full TypeScript inference, 10+ transports including RabbitMQ, Kafka, SQS, Azure Service Bus, GCP Pub/Sub, Redis, NATS, and in-memory for testing, 8+ stores including PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB, Redis, SQLite, SQL Server, and in-memory, built-in OpenTelemetry tracing, Prometheus metrics, and structured logging, compensation patterns and retry policies for graceful failure handling, and framework agnostic design that works with Express, Fastify, NestJS, Next.js, Hono, or standalone Node.js. The quick setup involves installing packages, defining saga with DSL, and starting the bus.
with: Type-Safe DSL with fluent builder API with full TypeScript inference.
Built-in OpenTelemetry tracing, Prometheus metrics, and structured logging middleware.
Works with Express, Fastify, NestJS, Next.js, Hono, or standalone Node.js.
const bus = createBus({ transport: new RabbitMQTransport({ url: process.env.RABBITMQ_URL }), store: new PostgresSagaStore({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }) });
without: Saga Bus is in active development
Switch between dark and light mode
